历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5752 → 5640 → 5814 → 6243 → 5410, showing a wide fluctuation trend over the past 5 years. The 2024 ranking of 6243 was the worst in recent years, while the 2025 ranking significantly recovered to 5410, the best in recent years, with a fluctuation range of about 800 positions. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 5410; from 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plan for Physics Category was stable at 62–63 students, increasing to 67 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 92 students, an increase of 25 students (+37.3%) compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, competition pressure is significantly alleviated, and the ranking is expected to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 25–32 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering strong schools in China; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving on-campus voyeurism incidents (34 negative out of 35 incidents), which may have a certain dampening effect on application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with low short video exposure; no historical abnormal admission records such as gaps were found for this school; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 disciplines rated A- or above: Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with South China University of Technology's engineering advantages, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of Hubei Province college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 393,700, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025, with an estimated 251,400 Physics Category candidates, competition slightly intensifying; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, an economically developed region, which has a certain appeal for cross-province applications from Hubei candidates; the proportion of enrollment in Hubei is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5410, the significant expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan by 37.3% (the dominant factor for ranking backward shift), the slight suppression of enthusiasm due to negative reputation, the high popularity of engineering majors enhancing attractiveness, and the slight increase in local candidates; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 6641, with a range of 6141–7141.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
